data.rules:
This is a market on if Joe Biden will be President of the United States on October 1, 2023, 12 PM ET.

This market will resolve to “Yes“ if, at the time of this market's resolution, Joe Biden is the President of the United States as officially substantiated by US government sources. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The primary resolution source for this market is https://www.whitehouse.gov/; however, other official government sources may be used.

action.reasoning: Recent news indicates that Joe Biden is actively engaged in his role as President, including announcing his reelection bid and addressing political issues. There are no reports suggesting any change in his status as President. Therefore, the probability that he will remain President on October 1, 2023, is very high.

action.reasoning: Despite discussions of impeachment and political challenges, there is no immediate threat to Biden's presidency by October 1, 2023. The news indicates political maneuvering but no concrete actions that would remove him from office imminently. Therefore, I maintain a high belief that he will remain President on the specified date.
